notes: Boss Rush UI hotfix. Global leaderboard panel now actually renders the top 10 (was silently failing on a missing helper). THE CORE description no longer shows the removed sync-system mechanics — uses time-rank rules (S < 1:30 / A < 2:15 / B < 3:00). Card text no longer overflows on the boss-rush selector. Boss roster subtitles trimmed to fit. Boss key regrant bug fixed: a -1 sentinel was re-granting 10 starter keys on some updates; replaced with a dedicated 'starter grant done' flag. Existing players auto-migrated — nobody gets free keys on this update.
